title: luzula campestris var. comosa
intro: Luzula campestris var. comosa, also known as common woodrush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Juncaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and providing relief from digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the Luzula campestris var. comosa can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
